summary: Video Check-in Scoring Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. VIDEO appointments now show 'Rejoindre la réunion' as primary CTA with manual check-in demoted to collapsed fallback. PHYSICAL appointments unchanged (no regression). Backend scoring correctly returns strength='weak' for video appointments without video evidence.
passed_tests: Backend: VIDEO apt + manual_checkin only → strength='weak'
Backend: VIDEO apt + QR + GPS (no video) → strength='weak'
Backend: PHYSICAL apt + QR + GPS → strength='strong' (no regression)
Backend: PHYSICAL apt + manual_checkin → strength='medium' (no regression)
Backend: VIDEO apt + weak evidence → manual_review decision
Backend: VIDEO apt + strong video evidence → on_time decision
Backend: aggregate_evidence function signature correct
Backend: aggregate_evidence checks appointment_type for video
Backend: Code path 'is_video_appointment and not has_video → weak' exists
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - header says 'Rejoindre la réunion' during active window
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - primary CTA is 'Rejoindre la réunion' button (blue)
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - text says 'Votre présence est vérifiée automatiquement'
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - fallback section 'Problème de connexion ?' collapsed
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - fallback button says 'Check-in de secours' (amber)
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - NO 'Je suis arrivé' button
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - NO QR buttons
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - before window shows 'présence vérifiée automatiquement via votre connexion'
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - checked-in state shows amber 'Check-in de secours' badge
Frontend: VIDEO apt InvitationPage - checked-in state shows warning note about verification
Frontend: PHYSICAL apt InvitationPage - header says 'Confirmer votre présence' (no regression)
Frontend: PHYSICAL apt InvitationPage - primary button is 'Je suis arrivé' (green, no regression)
Frontend: PHYSICAL apt InvitationPage - QR buttons visible (no regression)
Frontend: PHYSICAL apt InvitationPage - NO video-specific elements (no regression)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend evidence_service.py correctly implements video scoring at lines 686-719: is_video_appointment and not has_video → strength='weak'
Backend attendance_service.py correctly handles video + weak evidence → manual_review at lines 117-266
Frontend InvitationPage.js correctly renders video-specific check-in UI at lines 627-681
Frontend InvitationPage.js correctly shows 'Check-in de secours' amber badge for video manual check-in at lines 549-556
Frontend AppointmentDetail.js correctly shows organizer check-in with video fallback at lines 1273-1298
BUG FIX: Added meeting_join_url to invitation API response in /app/backend/routers/invitations.py line 145
seed_data_creation: Test appointments created and cleaned up during testing. No persistent test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video check-in scoring feature fully tested. Key points: 1) VIDEO appointments show 'Rejoindre la réunion' as primary CTA with manual check-in as collapsed fallback, 2) Backend scoring returns strength='weak' for video appointments without video evidence regardless of physical signals, 3) PHYSICAL appointments unchanged (no regression), 4) Fixed bug: meeting_join_url was missing from invitation API response.

bug_fixes_applied.description: Added meeting_join_url to invitation API response to enable 'Rejoindre la réunion' button
